lines.text: Summary of Sightings of Unknown Aerial Phenomena, 17th District OSI (cont)

99 | 10 Aug | 2100 | 4 | [REDACTED] b5 | Killeen Base, Texas | S | 30° above horizon going up | Continued climb at 30° angle until dis-appearance | Bright orange | Yes | 5 secs | None | Red-dish ball with long firey tail | Head size | [unclear] | Disappeared | [REDACTED] b5
